Zapier

Connect your apps and automate workflows with no-code automation

8/10Overall Rating
9/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2011Founded
Free Plan Available

About Zapier

Zapier is a ai automation platform founded in 2011. It positions itself as “Connect your apps and automate workflows with no-code automation” and is best suited for small businesses, marketers, non technical users. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportYes
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingYes
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Massive app library with 6000+ integrations
  • Very easy to set up simple automations
  • Excellent documentation and community

Cons

  • Gets expensive at scale
  • Limited complexity for advanced workflows
  • Task-based pricing can be unpredictable
